case_title: VITALY M GOLOMB VS. ANNA SANTERAMO

docket_entries.description: LETTER REQUEST TO SATISFY JUDGMENT FROM DEFENDANT. FILED BY DEFENDANT SANTERAMO, ANNA

REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT SANTERAMO, ANNA
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE IS "APPROVED", PER JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-10-2011 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO MAR-07-2011 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506, PER JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GOLOMB, VITALY M RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SANTERAMO, ANNA $7,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $130.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,630.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE IS "GRANTED", PER COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT.
